meta.query: (all:"document parsing" OR all:"document understanding" OR all:"optical character recognition" OR all:OCR OR all:"layout analysis" OR all:"document layout analysis" OR all:"text recognition" OR all:"table recognition" OR all:"form understanding" OR all:"document intelligence" OR all:"page understanding" OR all:"scene text recognition" OR all:"handwritten text recognition" OR all:"information extraction") AND (cat:cs.CV OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.CL OR cat:eess.IV)

synthesis.executive_summary: 今日OCR/文档解析研究日报涵盖6篇论文，重点关注结构化输出基准、OCR管道优化、文档伪造检测、文档视频基准以及高效多模态模型。结构化输出基准（SOB）首次覆盖文本、图像、音频三种模态，揭示了LLM在结构化输出上的能力差异。零售票据OCR管道通过自适应增强和后纠正显著提升了准确率。AI文档伪造检测面临严峻挑战，现有方法效果有限。文档视频基准FCMBench-Video为视频文档理解提供了标准化评估。DepthKV和Nemotron 3 Nano Omni分别从推理加速和高效多模态角度提供了工程化解决方案。
synthesis.trend_summary: 当前研究趋势集中在三个方向：1）多模态与结构化输出的深度融合，强调结构化输出质量的标准化评估；2）文档处理的实用化与效率优化，包括自适应增强、轻量级模型和推理加速；3）安全性与合规性，如AI生成文档的伪造检测与内容凭证失效问题。
common_innovations: 多来源结构化输出基准（SOB）首次统一评估文本、图像、音频模态的结构化输出质量
自适应OCR管道通过图像增强、质量分析和反馈循环显著提升零售票据识别准确率
AI文档伪造数据集揭示现有检测方法对GPT-Image-2伪造文档几乎无效
文档视频基准FCMBench-Video实现原子化采集与组合的工作流，覆盖时间推理
层依赖KV缓存剪枝DepthKV根据层敏感度非均匀分配预算，提升长上下文推理效率
Nemotron 3 Nano Omni采用多模态Token缩减技术，在文档理解任务上取得领先结果
future_directions: 扩展结构化输出基准至多语言和更多来源类型（如手写、表格）
联合评估结构化输出与推理过程，增强可解释性
引入端到端模型替代级联OCR管道，探索更轻量级的图像增强网络
开发针对AI修复痕迹的新型检测特征，构建更丰富的AI伪造文档数据集
扩展文档视频基准至更多语言和文档类型，引入音频或交互信息
将DepthKV层依赖剪枝与量化、蒸馏等压缩方法结合，实现自适应敏感度估计
探索Nemotron模型更激进的多模态Token缩减策略，扩展至低资源语言文档理解
engineering_takeaways: 结构化输出基准（SOB）可直接用于LLM选型和结构化输出性能调优
零售票据OCR管道在处理速度和准确率间取得良好平衡，适合实际部署
AIForge-Doc v2数据集为文档伪造检测提供基准，明确现有系统局限
FCMBench-Video可用于金融风控、远程验证等文档视频场景的系统评估
DepthKV可降低长上下文LLM推理显存占用，提升文档理解任务效率
Nemotron 3 Nano Omni开源模型适合资源受限场景的文档理解推理

watchlist.title: The Structured Output Benchmark: A Multi-Source Benchmark for Evaluating Structured Output Quality in Large Language Models
watchlist.watch_reason: 首个覆盖文本、图像、音频的结构化输出基准，其评估结果直接影响LLM在文档解析中的结构化输出能力评估和模型选型

watchlist.title: Benchmarking OCR Pipelines with Adaptive Enhancement for Multi-Domain Retail Bill Digitization
watchlist.watch_reason: 提出完整的自适应OCR工程方案，在零售票据数字化领域有直接应用价值，其处理速度和准确率权衡值得关注

watchlist.title: When the Forger Is the Judge: GPT-Image-2 Cannot Recognize Its Own Faked Documents
watchlist.watch_reason: 揭示AI文档伪造的严峻检测挑战，可能推动反伪造技术的重大变革，对文档安全领域有重要影响

watchlist.title: FCMBench-Video: Benchmarking Document Video Intelligence
watchlist.watch_reason: 首个文档视频智能基准，填补了视频文档理解评估的空白，对金融、远程验证等场景的系统评估有重要价值

watchlist.title: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni: Efficient and Open Multimodal Intelligence
watchlist.watch_reason: NVIDIA开源的高效多模态模型，在文档理解任务上取得领先结果，其Token缩减技术值得工程借鉴

papers.title: The Structured Output Benchmark: A Multi-Source Benchmark for Evaluating Structured Output Quality in Large Language Models
papers.summary: Large Language Models are increasingly being deployed to extract structured data from unstructured and semi-structured sources: parsing invoices, medical records, and converting PDF documents to database entries. Yet existing benchmarks for structured output generation either focus on schema compliance alone, or evaluate value correctness within a single source domain. We introduce SOB (The Structured Output Benchmark), a multi-source benchmark spanning three source modalities: native text, images, and audio conversations. All models receive a text-normalized representation of their context regardless of source modality; this deliberate design isolates structured-output capability from raw vision or speech-processing quality, ensuring a fair, source-agnostic comparison. Our benchmark comprises 5,000 text evaluation records derived from multi-hop QA drawn from a 25,091-record full corpus, 209 image records from OCR-processed PDFs across seven document types including multi-column layouts, dense tables, scanned historical documents, small-print text, and mathematical typesetting, and 115 audio records from the AMI corpus. Each record pairs a natural-language question with a JSON schema that the model must follow and a ground-truth answer verified against the source context. We evaluate 21 frontier and open-weight models across three source domains and seven metrics. Our results reveal a consistent pattern: models achieve near-perfect schema compliance, yet the best Value Accuracy, measured by exact leaf-value match, reaches only 83.0% on text, 67.2% on images, and 23.7% on audio, where longer context makes extraction substantially harder. We release the dataset, evaluation pipeline, and all related code.
papers.zh_summary: 提出一个多来源结构化输出基准（SOB），涵盖文本、图像和音频三种模态，聚焦于结构化输出质量评估。基准包含5000条文本、209条图像和115条音频记录。评估21个模型发现：模式遵循性接近完美，但值准确率在文本上最高仅83.0%，图像上67.2%，音频上23.7%。
papers.novelty: 首个覆盖文本、图像、音频三种来源的结构化输出基准，通过文本归一化排除底层感知能力差异，专注于结构化输出能力本身。
innovation_points: 多来源（文本、图像、音频）结构化输出基准设计
文本归一化处理以隔离结构化输出能力
大规模人工验证的标注数据构建
papers.limitations: 仅覆盖英文领域；音频来源仅限AMI语料库；未评估模型对复杂模式的鲁棒性。
improvement_directions: 扩展多语言和更多来源类型（如手写、表格）
引入结构化输出与推理过程的联合评估
研究模型在结构化输出错误上的可解释性
papers.engineering_value: 为评估LLM结构化输出质量提供标准化测试，可直接用于模型选型和性能调优。
papers.why_relevant: OCR/文档解析领域依赖结构化输出，该基准为评估文档解析后结构化质量提供参考。

papers.title: Benchmarking OCR Pipelines with Adaptive Enhancement for Multi-Domain Retail Bill Digitization
papers.summary: The digitization of multi-domain retail billing documents remains a challenging task due to variability in scan quality, layout heterogeneity, and domain diversity across commercial sectors. This paper proposes and benchmarks an intelligent, quality-aware adaptive Optical Character Recognition (OCR) pipeline for retail bill digitization spanning five domains: grocery stores, restaurants, hardware shops, footwear outlets, and clothing retailers. The proposed system integrates a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)-based image enhancement module trained via self-supervised denoising, a Laplacian variance-based image quality analyzer with three-tier routing, a confidence-driven adaptive feedback loop with iterative retry, and an NLP-based post-OCR correction layer. Experiments were conducted on a real-world dataset of 360 heterogeneous retail bill images. Ground truth for quantitative evaluation was generated using an OCR ensemble majority voting strategy, a validated approach for scenarios without manual annotation. The proposed pipeline achieves a Character Error Rate (CER) of 18.4% and Word Error Rate (WER) of 27.6%, representing improvements of 26.4% and 31.2% respectively over the Raw Tesseract baseline. The pipeline additionally achieves a text density of 108.3 words per image, a noise ratio of 2.3%, and a processing time of 3.64 seconds per image - a 6.4x speed advantage over EasyOCR. Image quality PSNR analysis on enhanced MEDIUM and LOW quality images yields an average of 28.7 dB, confirming meaningful enhancement. These results establish a reproducible benchmark for multi-domain retail bill OCR research.
papers.zh_summary: 提出自适应OCR管道用于多领域零售票据数字化，包含CNN图像增强、拉普拉斯方差质量分析、置信度驱动反馈循环和NLP后纠正模块。在360张异构票据上，字符错误率18.4%，词错误率27.6%，较原始Tesseract分别改善26.4%和31.2%，处理速度比EasyOCR快6.4倍。
papers.novelty: 结合图像质量自适应路由和迭代重试机制，针对零售票据的多种布局和噪声条件进行优化。
innovation_points: 基于CNN的自监督去噪图像增强模块
三路图像质量分类与自适应路由
置信度驱动的迭代反馈循环
NLP后纠正层处理OCR输出错误
papers.limitations: 数据集规模较小（360张），仅覆盖五个零售领域；未使用人工标注，采用集成投票生成真值。
improvement_directions: 扩展到更多文档类型和语言
引入端到端模型替代级联管道
探索更轻量级的图像增强网络
papers.engineering_value: 提供可直接部署的零售票据OCR系统，处理速度和准确率均衡，适合实际业务场景。
papers.why_relevant: 直接针对OCR应用中的文档数字化问题，提出的自适应增强方法可迁移至其他文档类型。

papers.title: When the Forger Is the Judge: GPT-Image-2 Cannot Recognize Its Own Faked Documents
papers.summary: OpenAI's GPT-Image-2 has effectively erased the visual boundary between authentic and AI-edited document images: a single number on a receipt can be replaced in under a second for a few cents. We release AIForge-Doc v2, a paired dataset of 3,066 GPT-Image-2 document forgeries with pixel-precise masks in DocTamper-compatible format, and benchmark four lines of defence: human inspectors (N=120, n=365 pair-votes via the public 2AFC site CanUSpotAI.com), TruFor (generic forensic), DocTamper (qcf-568, document-specific), and the same GPT-Image-2 model as a zero-shot self-judge -- asked, to avoid the trivial "image is mostly real" reading, whether any region was generated or edited by an AI image model. Human 2AFC accuracy is 0.501, indistinguishable from chance: even side-by-side, inspectors cannot tell GPT-Image-2 receipt forgeries from authentic counterparts. The three computational judges sit only modestly above (TruFor 0.599, DocTamper 0.585, self-judge 0.532). The self-judge fails consistently, not by chance: across five prompt strategies and four policies for handling ambiguous responses, AUC never rises above 0.59. To rule out the possibility that the two forensic detectors are broken on our source domain rather than blind to AI inpainting, we calibrate each on a same-domain traditional-tampering set built for its training distribution: TruFor reaches AUC 0.962 on cross-camera splicing of our dataset, DocTamper reaches 0.852 on cross-document OCR-token splicing with two-pass JPEG re-encoding. Both retain near-published performance on traditional tampering; switching to GPT-Image-2 inpainting drops AUC by 0.27-0.36 (0.962->0.599 TruFor; 0.852->0.585 DocTamper), isolating a detection gap specific to GPT-Image-2 inpainting. We release the dataset, pipeline, four-judge protocol, and calibration sets.
papers.zh_summary: 发布AIForge-Doc v2数据集，包含3066张GPT-Image-2伪造文档图像及像素级掩码。评估人类（准确率0.501，接近随机）以及三个计算检测器（TruFor 0.599，DocTamper 0.585，GPT-Image-2自判断0.532）。在传统篡改上检测器表现良好，但对AI修复效果不佳。
papers.novelty: 首个针对GPT-Image-2文档伪造的基准数据集和全面检测评估，发现现有方法对此类伪造基本无效。
innovation_points: GPT-Image-2伪造文档数据集构建，含像素级掩码
多维度检测评估（人类、通用、专用、自判断）
揭示AI文档伪造对检测的严峻挑战
papers.limitations: 仅针对GPT-Image-2一种模型；检测器未针对该伪造类型微调。
improvement_directions: 开发针对AI修复痕迹的新型检测特征
构建更丰富的AI伪造文档数据集
探索基于生成模型自身的检测方法
papers.engineering_value: 为文档安全领域提供检测基准，明确现有检测系统的局限，推动反伪造技术发展。
papers.why_relevant: OCR常处理文档图像，AI伪造对其真实性和可靠性构成威胁，此研究对安全验证有重要参考。

papers.title: GPT-Image-2 in the Wild: A Twitter Dataset of Self-Reported AI-Generated Images from the First Week of Deployment
papers.summary: The release of GPT-image-2 by OpenAI marks a watershed moment in AI-generated imagery: the boundary between photographic reality and synthetic content has never been more difficult to discern. We introduce the GPT-Image-2 Twitter Dataset, the first published dataset of GPT-image-2 generated images, sourced from publicly available Twitter/X posts in the immediate aftermath of the model's April 21, 2026 release. Leveraging the Twitter API v2 and a multi-stage curation pipeline spanning multilingual text heuristics (English, Japanese, and Chinese), browser-automated Twitter "Made with AI" badge verification, and model name variant matching, we curate 10,217 confirmed GPT-image-2 images from 27,662 collected records over a six-day window. We characterize the dataset across four analyses: CLIP-based zero-shot subject taxonomy, OCR text legibility (82.0% of images contain detectable text), face detection (59.2% of images, 22,583 total faces), and semantic clustering (137 CLIP ViT-L/14 clusters). A key negative result is that C2PA content credentials are systematically stripped by Twitter's CDN on upload, rendering cryptographic provenance verification infeasible for social-media-sourced AI images. The dataset and all curation code are released publicly.
papers.zh_summary: 发布GPT-Image-2 Twitter数据集，从4月21日发布后六天内收集10217张确认由GPT-Image-2生成的图像。分析发现：82%图像含可检测文本，59.2%含人脸，C2PA内容凭证在上传时被Twitter CDN剥离。
papers.novelty: 首个公开的AI生成图像数据集，聚焦于广泛应用后的真实世界分布，揭示了社交平台对内容凭证的影响。
innovation_points: 从社交媒体大规模收集AI生成图像的方法
多阶段筛选管道（文本启发式、标签验证、模型名称匹配）
包含CLIP主题分类、OCR可读性、人脸检测等分析
papers.limitations: 数据仅来自Twitter/X，存在平台偏差；时间窗口短（6天）；无人工标注图像内容。
improvement_directions: 跨平台收集以增加多样性
添加图像来源追踪标签
研究AI生成图像在社交平台中的传播和影响
papers.engineering_value: 为AI生成图像检测和分类提供真实世界训练数据，暴露内容凭证在传播中的失效问题。
papers.why_relevant: OCR检测AI生成文档文本可用此数据集验证；揭示社交媒体上AI文档图像的传播风险。

papers.title: FCMBench-Video: Benchmarking Document Video Intelligence
papers.summary: Document understanding is a critical capability in financial credit review, onboarding, and remote verification, where both decision accuracy and evidence traceability matter. Compared with static document images, document videos present a temporally redundant and sequentially unfolding evidence stream, require evidence integration across frames, and preserve acquisition-process cues relevant to authenticity-sensitive and anti-fraud review. We introduce FCMBench-Video, a benchmark for document-video intelligence that evaluates document perception, temporal grounding, and evidence-grounded reasoning under realistic capture conditions. For privacy-compliant yet realistic data at scale, we organize construction as an atomic-acquisition and composition workflow that records reusable single-document clips, applies controlled degradations, and assembles long-form multi-document videos with prescribed temporal spans. FCMBench-Video is built from 495 atomic videos composed into 1,200 long-form videos paired with 11,322 expert-annotated question--answer instances, covering 28 document types over 20s--60s duration tiers and 5,960 Chinese / 5,362 English instances. Evaluations on nine recent Video-MLLMs show that FCMBench-Video provides meaningful separation across systems and capabilities: counting is the most duration-sensitive task, Cross-Document Validation and Evidence-Grounded Selection probe higher-level evidence integration, and Visual Prompt Injection provides a complementary robustness dimension. The overall score distribution is broad and approximately bell-shaped, indicating a benchmark that is neither saturated nor dominated by trivial cases. Together, these results position FCMBench-Video as a reproducible benchmark for tracking Video-MLLM progress on document-video understanding and probing capability boundaries in authenticity-sensitive credit-domain applications.
papers.zh_summary: 提出FCMBench-Video，首个面向文档视频智能的基准，覆盖文档感知、时间定位和基于证据的推理。由495段原子视频组成1200段长视频，包含11322个带有专家标注的问答对，涵盖28种文档类型。评估9个Video-MLLM发现：计数任务对时长最敏感，跨文档验证和证据选择测试高层次推理。
papers.novelty: 首个兼顾时间维度证据流的文档视频基准，通过原子化采集和组合工作流生成大规模、隐私合规的数据。
innovation_points: 文档视频的原子化采集与组合工作流
覆盖文档感知、时间定位、证据推理的评估维度
跨文档验证和视觉提示注入的鲁棒性测试
papers.limitations: 仅包含中文和英文实例；视频时长限制在20-60秒。
improvement_directions: 扩展更多语言和文档类型
引入视频中的音频或交互信息
探索端到端文档视频理解模型
papers.engineering_value: 为文档视频智能系统提供标准化评估，适用于金融风控、远程验证等真实场景。
papers.why_relevant: OCR/文档解析扩展到视频领域，此基准为评估视频中文档理解能力提供工具。

papers.title: DepthKV: Layer-Dependent KV Cache Pruning for Long-Context LLM Inference
papers.summary: Long-context reasoning is a critical capability of large language models (LLMs), enabling applications such as long-document understanding, summarization, and code generation. However, efficient autoregressive inference relies on the key-value (KV) cache, whose memory footprint grows linearly with sequence length, leading to a major memory bottleneck. To mitigate this overhead, KV cache pruning methods discard cached tokens with low attention scores during inference. Most existing methods apply a uniform pruning ratio across layers, implicitly assuming that all layers contribute equally to overall model performance. We show that this assumption is suboptimal, as layers differ significantly in their sensitivity to pruning. We propose DepthKV, a layer-dependent pruning framework that allocates a fixed global KV budget across layers based on their sensitivity, rather than using a uniform allocation. Across multiple models and tasks, DepthKV consistently outperforms uniform pruning at the same global pruning ratio, demonstrating more effective utilization of the KV cache budget through layer-dependent allocation.
papers.zh_summary: 提出DepthKV，一种层依赖的KV缓存剪枝方法，根据各层对剪枝的敏感度分配缓存预算，而非均匀分配。在多个模型和任务上，相同全局剪枝比率下优于均匀剪枝。
papers.novelty: 发现不同层对KV缓存剪枝敏感度不同，提出层依赖分配策略，更有效利用缓存预算。
innovation_points: 层敏感度分析与剪枝比例分配方法
固定全局缓存预算下的非均匀分配框架
papers.limitations: 仅验证了注意力基于的剪枝策略；未探索与量化等技术的结合。
improvement_directions: 结合其他压缩方法（量化、蒸馏）
自适应敏感度估计减少额外开销
扩展到长序列场景的流式剪枝
papers.engineering_value: 降低长上下文LLM推理的显存占用，直接提升文档理解等长序列任务的效率。
papers.why_relevant: LLM在文档理解中的推理效率是关键工程问题，DepthKV可加速长文档处理。

papers.title: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni: Efficient and Open Multimodal Intelligence
papers.summary: We introduce Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, the latest model in the Nemotron multimodal series and the first to natively support audio inputs alongside text, images, and video. Nemotron 3 Nano Omni delivers consistent accuracy improvements over its predecessor, Nemotron Nano V2 VL, across all modalities, enabled by advances in architecture, training data and recipes. In particular, Nemotron 3 delivers leading results in real-world document understanding, long audio-video comprehension, and agentic computer use. Built on the highly efficient Nemotron 3 Nano 30B-A3B backbone, Nemotron 3 Nano Omni further incorporates innovative multimodal token-reduction techniques to deliver substantially lower inference latency and higher throughput than other models of similar size. We are releasing model checkpoints in BF16, FP8, and FP4 formats, along with portions of the training data and codebase to facilitate further research and development.
papers.zh_summary: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 是 NVIDIA 发布的一款高效开放多模态模型，原生支持文本、图像、视频和音频输入。相比前代，它在架构、训练数据和配方上进行了改进，在文档理解、长音视频理解和智能体计算机用方面取得领先结果。模型基于 30B-A3B 高效骨架，采用创新的多模态 Token 缩减技术，推理延迟更低、吞吐量更高。已发布 BF16、FP8 和 FP4 格式的检查点，并开源部分训练数据和代码。
papers.novelty: 首次在 Nemotron 系列中原生支持音频输入，并引入多模态 Token 缩减技术，实现高效推理。
innovation_points: 原生支持音频输入，统一处理文本、图像、视频和音频多模态
采用高效的 30B-A3B 混合专家骨架
创新的多模态 Token 缩减技术降低推理延迟
在真实文档理解任务上取得领先结果
papers.limitations: 模型虽小但参数规模仍较大（30B），部署资源需求可能仍较高；仅关注多模态理解和生成，未涉及多模态编辑等任务。
improvement_directions: 探索更激进的 Token 缩减策略以进一步降低计算成本
扩展至更多模态（如触觉、深度）
提升对低资源语言的文档理解能力
结合强化学习优化智能体计算机用任务
papers.engineering_value: 提供高效的多模态推理方案，适合资源受限场景；开源模型和代码促进产业应用和二次开发。
papers.why_relevant: 该模型在文档理解任务上表现突出，且支持音频与视频的联合理解，与 OCR 和文档解析场景高度相关。
